About

The Developer Behind
the Scripts

I am Elephantpoopp, a Roblox Scripter with 3+ years of experience building gameplay systems, mechanics, and polished experiences in Roblox Studio.

I specialize in clean, efficient Lua code that powers games from the ground up, from core game loops to complex systems that keep players engaged.

Portfolio

Featured Work

Systems and projects built over 3+ years in Roblox Studio.

● WEBSITE STILL IN DEVELOPMENT — MORE SYSTEMS COMING SOON

Most systems are undocumented and built for private use.

UI
Game Menu UI
UI
Game Menu UI
Full game menu with Store, Gifts, Config, Stats, Rebirth, Codes and Day tabs. Animated buttons, progress bar and reward system.
Admin
Admin Abuse System
Admin
Admin Abuse System
Full admin panel with announcements, polls, events with VFX, server boosts and gift system. Built entirely from scratch in Lua.
Combat
Combat System
Combat
Combat System
Full combat system with M1 combos, heavy attacks, blocking, guard break, clash mechanic, stamina system, knockback and damage numbers.
Cinematic
Cutscene System
Cinematic
Cutscene System
Cinematic intro cutscene with dynamic camera movement, smooth transitions and on-screen text. Plays automatically when joining the game.
Gameplay
Fishing System
Gameplay
Fishing System
Full fishing system with rod casting, bite detection, shake mechanic and atmospheric night environment. Fully scripted from scratch in Lua.
Gameplay
Fuse Machine System
Gameplay
Fuse Machine System
Full fusion system with item combining, rarity percentages, fusion timer and custom UI. Players fuse items to discover secret and rare results.
Dialogue
Dialogue System
Dialogue
Dialogue System
Custom NPC dialogue system with speech bubbles, choice options and proximity detection. Fully scripted from scratch in Lua.
